name: vprchat-desktop
description: VPR Chat desktop wrapper — privacy-first encrypted messaging

scripts.release: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const run=c=>{console.log('> '+c);execSync(c,{stdio:'inherit'})}; try{execSync('git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet')}catch(e){console.error('Working tree has uncommitted changes. Commit or stash first.');process.exit(1)} run('git tag v'+v); run('git push origin v'+v); console.log('\nPushed tag v'+v+' — GitHub Actions will build and publish the Release.');"
